testcase.name: test_failed_login_creates_audit_log

failure.message: AssertionError: No failed login count after failed login attempt assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3ac67fa340>('failed_logins_24h', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3ac67fa340> = {'active_sessions': 11, 'failed_logins_24h': 0, 'rate_limit_hits': 0, 'successful_logins_24h': 9, ...}.get

testcase.failure: test_security_faz7.py:287: in test_failed_login_creates_audit_log assert overview.get('failed_logins_24h', 0) >= 1, "No failed login count after failed login attempt" E AssertionError: No failed login count after failed login attempt E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3ac67fa340>('failed_logins_24h', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa3ac67fa340> = {'active_sessions': 11, 'failed_logins_24h': 0, 'rate_limit_hits': 0, 'successful_logins_24h': 9, ...}.get
